basic_details.job_title: IISc Deputy Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science (IISc) Deputy Administrative Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the IISc Deputy Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 450/- application fee + Rs. 50/- processing fee

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree with a minimum of 50% marks
qualification.details: Deputy Administrative Officer: Bachelor's Degree with a minimum of 50% marks and Staff from the Central/State Govt/UTs or Central Universities/ Institutions/ Autonomous Bodies or Central Govt. Laboratories, Statutory Organization's, or PSU/PSFs. (a) Holding an analogous post or (b) At least 05 years of experience as a Superintendent or equivalent in pay Level 07 and above as per 7th CPC.

salary_details.details: Level - 08 as per 7th CPC (₹47600 – 151100) Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISc to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISc Deputy Administrative Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IISc Deputy Administrative Officer recruitment is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree with a minimum of 50% marks. Additionally, they need to be staff from specific government organizations or hold analogous posts with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Administrative Officer post is 56 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Administrative Officer position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Deputy Administrative Officer post announced by the Indian Institute of Science (IISc).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Administrative Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in Level - 08 as per the 7th CPC, which ranges from Rs. 47,600 to Rs. 1,51,100 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IISc Deputy Administrative Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 450/- application fee plus Rs. 50/- processing fee. SC/ST and Women candidates only need to pay Rs. 50/- processing fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Deputy Administrative Officer recruitment will primarily involve a Job-oriented Aptitude Test.

faq.question: Q8. Is this recruitment on a deputation basis?
faq.answer: Yes, this recruitment for the Deputy Administrative Officer post is on a deputation basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Indian Institute of Science?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Science (IISc) is https://iisc.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to apply.
